headline: Equinix Expands Fabric Geo Zones for Sovereign Data Control
summary: EQIX expands Fabric Geo Zones globally, adding network-level sovereign enforcement to keep sensitive data within compliant borders.

raw.headline: Equinix Expands Fabric Geo Zones for Sovereign Data Control
raw.summary: EQIX expands Fabric Geo Zones globally, adding network-level sovereign enforcement to keep sensitive data within compliant borders.

headline: How The Investment Narrative For Equinix (EQIX) Is Shifting After New Guidance And Valuation Debates
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Equinix has moved from US$1,110.59 to US$1,197.11, giving investors fresh numbers to compare against the current share price. This shift comes as analysts split into bullish and more cautious camps, with some pointing to sticky revenue and raised guidance, and others questioning how much optimism is already reflected after a strong rally and large target increases. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving narrative and what...
